basic_details.job_title: DSHM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 141 Legal Consultant, Field Monitor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Delhi State Health Mission (DSHM), State Health Society Delhi, State Program Management Unit
basic_details.post_name: Dental Surgeon, Field Monitor, Public Health Manager, Lady Health Visitor, and Various Other Posts
basic_details.department: Delhi State Health Mission (DSHM), Govt. of NCT of Delhi
basic_details.short_information: Delhi State Health Mission DSHM Recruitment 2026: Get the latest DSHM recruitment notification 2026 for 141 various posts vacancies under the Delhi State Health Mission (DSHM), State Program Management Unit, Delhi. The online application process starts on 28th April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 12th May 2026. Find DSHM vacancies across Delhi on the official website dshm.delhi.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming DSHM Recruitment 2026” notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for DSHM Recruitment 2026 apply online fro

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on DSHM official website

application_fee.details: No application fee is required for any category of candidates for DSHM Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age limit is post-wise as mentioned above. Age relaxation will be provided as per Govt. of NCT of Delhi / Govt. of India norms as follows:

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (12-05-2026). The educational qualification must be from a recognized University/Institute/Board. Candidates must ensure their eligibility before applying; incomplete or incorrect applications will be rejected. Admission at all stages is provisional and subject to eligibility verification. | Post-wise Educational Qualification and Remuneration

selection_process: Stage 1 Scrutiny / Shortlisting of Applications (based on higher qualification, relevant experience, or any other criteria as decided by competent authority)
Tie-Break Higher qualification / experience / age will be considered in case of tie

The selection process for DSHM Recruitment 2026 consists of the following stages. Only registered candidates will be allowed to appear for document verification and interview. No separate call letters will be issued - candidates must regularly check the official website for interview schedule updates.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the DSHM Online Application Portal, accessible on the official website https://dshm.delhi.gov.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 28-04-2026 to 12-05-2026 (5:00 PM). Candidates must ensure eligibility before applying - incomplete or incorrect applications will be rejected. Suppression of facts or false information will lead to cancellation of candidature.

The engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular appointment. The contract is initially upto 31-03-2027 and extendable based on performance and approval. A probation period of 03 months shall be applicable. The remuneration is consolidated and no other allowances shall be admissible. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
Documents to be Brought at the Time of Document Verification:
important_instructions: The engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular/permanent appointment. Candidates must ensure eligibility before applying - no application fee is charged. No hard copy applications will be accepted - online submission only. No separate call letters will be issued for interview - candidates must check https://dshm.delhi.gov.in regularly. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Mobile phones and electronic gadgets are banned inside interview/document verification premises. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease at any stage. DSHM reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process in full or part without assigning any reason. Suppression of facts or furnishing false information will lead to cancellation of candidature at any stage. Selected candidates may be posted anywhere within Delhi. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of the Chairman, State Health Society (Delhi) regarding selection will be final - no representation shall be entertained. Legal jurisdiction will be Delhi only. All further updates regarding this recruitment will be available only on the official website.

faq.question: Q1. What is Delhi State Health Mission (DSHM) Recruitment 2026 (Advt. 4-2026)?
faq.answer: Delhi State Health Mission (DSHM), State Health Society Delhi, has released Advertisement No. 4‑2026 for recruitment to 141 various contractual posts under different health programmes in Delhi. The posts include Dental Surgeon, Field Monitor, Public Health Manager, Lady Health Visitor and several managerial, technical and consultant positions at the State and District level.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in DSHM Recruitment 2026 and which posts are included?
faq.answer: A total of 141 vacancies have been announced under DSHM Recruitment 2026. The notification covers 13 different posts, including 25 Dental Surgeons, 33 Field Monitors, 33 Public Health Managers, 33 Lady Health Visitors, and smaller numbers of District Quality Assurance Coordinators, District Program Managers, IEC/BCC Officers, Nutritionists/Dieticians, Medical Lecturers, Database Administrator, Quality Assurance Consultant, State IEC/BCC Consultant and Legal Consultants.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for DSHM Recruitment 2026 (online application and interviews)?
faq.answer: The advertisement for DSHM Recruitment 2026 (Advt. 4‑2026) is dated 28 April 2026. The online application process starts on 28 April 2026 and the last date to submit applications is 12 May 2026 up to 5:00 PM, while the detailed schedule for document verification and personal interviews will be uploaded later on the official website dshm.delhi.gov.in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the nature of engagement and contract period for these DSHM posts?
faq.answer: All posts under this DSHM notification are purely contractual and do not confer any right to regular or permanent appointment under the Government of NCT of Delhi. The initial engagement is up to 31 March 2027, with a probation period (generally 3 months) and possible extension based on performance, programme requirement and approval of the competent authority.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for key posts like Dental Surgeon, Field Monitor, Public Health Manager and Lady Health Visitor?
faq.answer: For Dental Surgeon, candidates must have a BDS degree from a Dental Council of India recognized institution, valid Delhi Dental Council registration and at least 1–2 years of relevant experience. Field Monitor requires a graduate degree with 3 years’ field experience in immunization or similar health programmes and preferably own motorized two‑wheeler with valid licence. Public Health Manager needs a medical or non‑medical graduate (Dental/AYUSH/Nursing/Life Sciences/Social Sciences) with a Master’s degree in Public Health or related field plus 2 years’ programme management experience, while Lady Health Visitor requires 12th pass with ANM/LHV/MPW course and prescribed experience and registration with Delhi Nursing Council.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit and relaxation for DSHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit varies by post, for example up to 35 years for Dental Surgeon, 45 years for Field Monitor and Public Health Manager, 30 years for Lady Health Visitor, and 40–45 years for most managerial/consultant posts, with a higher ceiling for retired Medical Lecturer up to 64 years. Relaxations are applicable as per Government of NCT of Delhi/Government of India norms, typically 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Non‑Creamy Layer) and 10 years for PwBD candidates, subject to maximum age conditions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the monthly remuneration for different DSHM posts?
faq.answer: The DSHM notification prescribes consolidated monthly remuneration on a post‑wise basis, with no additional allowances. Indicatively, Dental Surgeon posts carry around ₹71,550 per month, Field Monitor ₹28,853, Public Health Manager ₹50,000, Lady Health Visitor ₹34,000, Medical Lecturer about ₹85,050, Database Administrator and Quality Assurance Consultant around ₹62,500, and other managerial/consultant posts in the ₹38,000–₹50,000 range as per the detailed table.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for DSHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category for DSHM Recruitment 2026. Candidates can complete the online registration and submit their applications free of cost through the official DSHM portal within the prescribed dates.
